typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace outdated `OpenBurnBar*` XCTest filter examples with canonical `.factory/services.yaml` `BurnBar*` commands and require focused-command evidence capture to prevent command/evidence drift during reruns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-4 fix review still observed SKILL command examples using `OpenBurnBar*` while canonical commands in `.factory/services.yaml` use `BurnBar*`, indicating ongoing systemic process drift risk.
